root_collection.title: Shop by Deity
root_collection.body_html: Shop deity jewellery by deity, ornament type and idol size. Choose Varalakshmi, Lakshmi, Balaji, Krishna, Ganesh, Shiva or Durga, then filter crowns, harams, vaddanam and alankaram accessories by fit.
root_collection.seo_title: Shop by Deity Jewellery | Hindu Idol Alankaram
root_collection.seo_description: Shop deity jewellery by deity, ornament type and idol size. Find crowns, harams, vaddanam and alankaram accessories for Hindu idols.

deity_collections.title: Varalakshmi Deity Jewellery
deity_collections.body_html: Shop Varalakshmi deity jewellery and alankaram accessories by ornament type, idol size and measured fit. Find crowns, harams, vaddanam, hands, legs and festive setup pieces for Varalakshmi Vratham and pooja decoration.
deity_collections.collection_intro: Shop Varalakshmi deity jewellery and alankaram accessories by ornament type, idol size and measured fit.
deity_collections.size_fit_intro: For Varalakshmi, check idol or kalasam height, face width, crown space, hand and leg placement, and dress width before ordering.
deity_collections.seo_description: Shop Varalakshmi deity jewellery, crowns, harams, vaddanam, hands and legs by idol size and measured fit for pooja alankaram.

deity_collections.title: Lakshmi / Amman Deity Jewellery
deity_collections.body_html: Shop Lakshmi and Amman deity jewellery by ornament type, idol size and measured fit. Find crowns, necklaces, harams, vaddanam and alankaram accessories for goddess idols and pooja decoration.
deity_collections.collection_intro: Shop Lakshmi and Amman deity jewellery by ornament type, idol size and measured fit.
deity_collections.size_fit_intro: For Lakshmi and Amman idols, check idol height, head or face width, chest width, waist placement and measured ornament size before ordering.
deity_collections.seo_title: Lakshmi Amman Deity Jewellery | Idol Alankaram
deity_collections.seo_description: Shop Lakshmi and Amman deity jewellery, crowns, harams, vaddanam and accessories by idol size and measured fit.

deity_collections.collection_intro: Shop Balaji, Venkateswara, Vishnu and Perumal deity jewellery by ornament type, idol size and measured fit.
deity_collections.size_fit_intro: For Balaji and Vishnu-family idols, check idol height, head width, namam placement, ornament width and posture before ordering.

deity_collections.seo_description: Shop Balaji, Venkateswara, Vishnu and Perumal deity jewellery with crowns, namam, shankh chakra and alankaram accessories.

deity_collections.size_fit_intro: For Krishna idols, check idol height, head width, flute or peacock-feather placement, chest width and measured ornament size before ordering.
